summary: Round-2 verification for Task 8. All six round-1 findings are resolved: cold callbackFlow from registry.download() is now terminally subscribed via launchIn(viewModelScope) with an explanatory comment; the stray Spacer in the NOT_DOWNLOADED branch is gone (along with the now-unused Spacer/height imports); the redundant enabled=true on the Load button is removed; ModelStatusRow is renamed to ModelStatusSection at definition and call site; the dead coerceAtLeast(1) is dropped (division is still guarded by the outer totalBytes > 0L check plus coerceIn); StatusBadge no longer wraps a single Text in a Row (and the Row import is cleaned up). No regressions detected — imports resolve, the Color parameter uses a fully-qualified name so no new import is required, and the progress fraction cannot divide by zero because the outer if-guard is preserved.
